Best for: sequential, structured pipelines." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="72" width="272" x="354" y="192" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bg3" parent="1" Voting improves reliability. synthesizes results. Best for: complex multi-skill tasks, business workflows." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="272" x="354" y="490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bg6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e8f8e8;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=6;pointerEvents=0;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="252" width="330" x="660" y="318" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h-w3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;" value="W3" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="52" x="862" relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h-e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="h-sa" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;" target="h-w1" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h-e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="h-sa" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;" target="h-w2" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;fontSize=11;whiteSpace=wrap;verticalAlign=top;" value="Multiple supervision layers. Master delegates to domain supervisors who manage specialist workers. Best for: enterprise-scale, multi-domain systems." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="302" x="674" y="516" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="principle" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=#999999;fillColor=#f5f5f5;align=center;fontSize=11;fontColor=#444444;spacingTop=4;spacingBottom=4;" value="Design principle: always choose the simplest pattern that meets your requirements. Add layers only when complexity demands it." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="960" x="30" y="582" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div: Output of each LLM call feeds the next. Validation gates between steps reject bad output before proceeding. Best for: sequential, structured pipelines.

div.div: Multiple supervision layers. Master delegates to domain supervisors who manage specialist workers. Best for: enterprise-scale, multi-domain systems.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 597px; margin-left: 501px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #444444;

div.div: Design principle: always choose the simplest pattern that meets your requirements. Add layers only when complexity demands it.
